text.arabic: (بِسْمِ اللَّهِ وَلَجْنَا، وَبِسْمِ اللَّهِ خَرَجْنَا، وَعَلَى اللَّهِ رَبِّنَا تَوَكَّلْنَا، ثُمَّ لِيُسَلِّمْ عَلَى أَهْلِهِ).
text.arabicTranslated: (Bismil-lahi walajna, wabismil-lahi kharajna, waAAala rabbina tawakkalna.)
text.translated: (In the name of Allah we enter and in the name of Allah we leave, and upon our Lord we place our trust.)

title: What to say when entering the home
